statement.label: About
statement.tagline: Not a hotel. A way of living. Work hard. Recover hard. Back to life.

complexe.label: The complex
complexe.title: A former farmhouse turned house of care.
complexe.text: In Marlenheim, MYRA takes place in a former Alsatian farmhouse, once designed to welcome, lodge and gather. The project extends this memory by transforming it into a contemporary house dedicated to the body, rest and connection.
complexe.text_2: The existing volumes, the courtyard, the stone, the raw materials and the silence of the territory become the starting point of a new way to inhabit well-being. Here, architecture is not merely a backdrop: it guides the rhythm, protects intimacy and gives the place its depth.

communaute.label: Community
communaute.description: Joining MYRA means entering a private circle where body, rest and encounter are cultivated. A house more than a place — a setting chosen by those who demand more of their daily life, and share the desire to inhabit care with rigour and presence.

double.label: Hospitality & Excellence
double.text: MYRA brings together private suites, performance space, spa, healthy table and gathering places within a reinterpreted former farmhouse. Each space extends the same intention: restore energy, cultivate the body, create connection.

citation.text: In an intimate setting, MYRA shapes a new vision of the relationship with the body. More than a place — a standard.
citation.author: Jérémy P.

services.label: Our rituals
services.s1_desc: Advanced protocols. Private coaching. Precision biomechanical monitoring.
services.s2_desc: 200 m² dedicated. Sauna, hammam, hydrotherapy. A space to return to yourself.
services.s3_desc: Dietetic restaurant, local sourcing, pairings designed for your metabolism.
services.s4_desc: Private suites in Alsace. Discreet luxury. Back to life.

team.label: The Team
team.tina_quote: Performance is not an act. It is a habit of precision.
team.jeremy_quote: Work hard. Recover hard. Back to life.

soutenir.genese_p1: MYRA was born from a refusal. The refusal to live halfway. A place to work hard, recover hard, and come back. Rooted in Marlenheim — day one. Not the finish line.
soutenir.genese_p2: Marlenheim is the living prototype. The blueprint. We lay the foundations, lock in the codes. Expansion follows.
soutenir.s1_desc: Market produce, cuisine of the moment. A real table — not a catalogue.
soutenir.s2_desc: Sauna, hammam, treatments. 200 m² to return to yourself — without compromise.
soutenir.s3_desc: High-technology floor. Tailored coaching. Not a standard gym.
soutenir.team_desc: People who live what they build.
soutenir.tina_bio: Visionary and guardian of MYRA's DNA. Excellence in every detail.
soutenir.jeremy_bio: His understanding of balance enables the alliance between performance and recovery.
soutenir.timeline_subtitle: Every contribution brings MYRA closer to its full form.
soutenir.final_text: To those who share our vision. Thank you for being part of this quest — where every gesture counts, every season teaches us, and every encounter elevates us.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.data_text: MYRA Society only collects data you voluntarily share via the site's forms: name, email address, message. This data is used exclusively to respond to your requests.
privacy.cookies_text: This site uses strictly necessary technical cookies for its operation. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.rights_text: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@myrasociety.com.
